name: replicate-mcp-server
description: Universal MCP server for the full Replicate catalog: image, video, audio, music, speech (TTS+STT), LLMs, vision, upscale, inpaint, segment, embeddings, voice cloning, 3D, lipsync, trainings (fine-tune) and deployments, plus async batch + DAG pipeline orchestration and a model recommender. Every generate/run tool waits for completion and auto-downloads outputs. 36 tools, 63 curated models.

replicate_api_token.title: Replicate API token
replicate_api_token.description: Your Replicate API token (starts with r8_). Get one at https://replicate.com/account/api-tokens. Stored in the OS keychain. Required for any generation call — the server starts without it (so its tools can be listed) but every model call needs it.
